text:
Staff Frequency of Indicator of Pain or Possible Pain Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency of the resident's pain or possible pain in the last five days. -=Not assessed/no information
 1=Indicators of pain or possible pain observed 1 to 2 days
 2=Indicators of pain or possible pain observed 3 to 4 days
 3=Indicators of possible pain observed daily
^=Blank (skip pattern)
350 J1100A_SOB_EXRTN_CD J1100A_SOB_EXRTN_CD J1100A Shortness of Breath With Exertion Code
